hero_sub: Complete freight solutions bridging Jordan with the rest of the world. We handle the logistics by sea, air, and land so you can stay focused on your business.
about_p1: Based in Amman, Reflection Logistics combines local expertise with a global network. With 25 years of experience moving cargo across borders, we make sure our clients’ shipments arrive without the usual complications.
about_p2: From shipping containers through Aqaba to urgent air freight via Queen Alia, we manage every detail of the process so you don't have to.
svc_sub: Whether it’s a single container or a complex air freight shipment, we have the network and experience to get it there.
svc_air_p: When timing is critical, we get your cargo moving fast. We work directly with major airports to ensure your goods are handled securely and clear customs without unnecessary delays.
svc_land_p: Reliable road transport across borders worldwide. We offer flexible shipping options for any load size, delivering straight to your door.
svc_sea_p: Global container shipping through the Port of Aqaba. We manage everything from port operations to final delivery, offering reliable schedules for both full and partial loads.
svcp_sub: From urgent air freight to full container loads via Aqaba, we manage every step of the journey to keep your supply chain moving smoothly.
svcp_air_p: Secure and fast air freight for time-sensitive cargo. We handle everything from pickup to delivery, including full customs support at Queen Alia International Airport.
svcp_sea_p: Cost-effective container shipping through the Port of Aqaba. We offer both FCL and LCL options, managing the entire process from the port to your final destination.
svcp_land_p: Extensive road transport network covering Jordan and destinations worldwide. Our fleet handles full and partial truckloads with real-time updates and professional management.
svcp_customs_p: We take the headache out of customs. Our team handles all documentation and compliance at every Jordanian port of entry, ensuring your cargo clears quickly and correctly.
svcp_wh_p: Safe and organized storage solutions to help you manage your inventory. We are currently expanding our warehouse facilities in strategic locations across Jordan.
svcp_proj_p: Specialized logistics for oversized or heavy equipment. We create custom transport plans for large-scale projects, ensuring even the most challenging cargo reaches its destination safely.
trust_sub: Officially registered and recognized by leading logistics authorities in Jordan.
trust_cta_p: Work with a logistics partner you can trust.
svcp_cta_p: Tell us about your shipping needs and our team will get back to you with a practical solution within 24 hours.

car_sub: We are expanding our team to build the most reliable logistics network in Jordan. If you are professional, dedicated, and ready to grow with us, we’d like to hear from you.
cta_p: Tell us about your shipping needs and we'll provide a tailored solution that works for your business.
footer_brand_p: Connecting Jordan to the world with dependable freight and logistics services you can count on.
footer_rights: © Reflection Logistics. All Rights Reserved.
about_hero_p: Reflection Logistics is an Amman-based company dedicated to providing reliable international freight services. We simplify the complexities of the supply chain so you can focus on running your business.
about_who_p1: Reflection Freight Forwarding and Logistic Services started with a simple goal: to provide businesses in Jordan with a more reliable way to move their goods across borders.
about_who_p2: Over the years, we have built a reputation for transparency and efficiency. Whether it's by air, sea, or land, we focus on getting the job done right the first time.
about_who_p3: We believe in being more than just a service provider; we aim to be a long-term partner in your company’s growth.
mv_miss_p: To provide straightforward, dependable freight solutions that help our clients grow by ensuring their cargo moves safely and efficiently across global markets.
mv_vis_p: To be the first choice for logistics in the Middle East, known for our commitment to reliability and our deep understanding of regional and global trade.
about_svc_p: We offer a full range of freight forwarding services. Through strong partnerships and local expertise, we make sure your shipments reach their destination on time and in good condition.
why_sub: Clients rely on us because we prioritize clear communication and dependable service. We work as your partner, making sure every shipment is handled with the care it deserves.
why_c1_p: We focus on on-time delivery and keep you updated at every stage of the shipping process.
why_c2_p: Our team is available 24/7 to support active shipments. You’ll always have a point of contact who knows your business.
why_c3_p: We handle all the paperwork and compliance at Jordanian borders to prevent unnecessary delays or costs.
why_c4_p: From small parcels to full containers, we find the most efficient way to move your cargo based on your budget and timeline.
why_c5_p: With over 25 years in the industry, we understand the specific regulations and routes across Jordan and worldwide.
why_c6_p: No hidden fees or surprises. We provide clear documentation and tracking from start to finish.
reach_p: While our heart is in Amman, our network reaches across the globe, connecting regional businesses to every major trade route.
reach_hq_p: Amman, Jordan — King Abdullah II Street, next to Zain Company, Abbasi Complex.
reach_port_p: Expert management of all cargo passing through the Port of Aqaba, Jordan's vital link to the sea.
reach_air_p: Direct connections through Queen Alia International Airport for fast international shipments.
about_cta_p: Whether you are shipping for the first time or looking for a more reliable partner, our team is ready to help.
proj_sub: Every project listed here represents a successful delivery and a satisfied client. We take pride in solving logistics challenges, no matter the size.
p1_sub: Full container load of industrial equipment, managed from port to port with precision.
p1_overview: A client needed to move heavy industrial machinery to a manufacturing site in the Netherlands. This required careful container planning and coordination with multiple port authorities. Our team handled everything from initial booking to the final unloading.
p1_challenge: Managing complex documentation for specialized goods across multiple ports while adhering to a strict delivery window in Rotterdam.
p1_solution: We completed all paperwork 10 days in advance and secured a specific transshipment slot to ensure the shipment arrived exactly on time.
p2_sub: Temperature-controlled pharmaceutical shipment delivered via air freight with zero interruptions.
p2_overview: This project involved shipping time-sensitive medical supplies that had to be kept between 2°C and 8°C. We used a dedicated cold-chain solution from Amman to Dubai.
p2_challenge: The high temperatures at both airports posed a risk to the sensitive cargo during a very tight delivery window.
p2_solution: We utilized active cooling containers and prioritized tarmac loading to minimize exposure to the heat, monitoring temperatures in real-time.
p3_sub: Ongoing FTL distribution for a regional retail group, managing 12 truckloads every month.
p3_overview: We manage the primary supply line for a consumer goods distributor, moving 12 full truckloads monthly from Amman to distribution centers in Riyadh.
p3_challenge: Border congestion often causes significant delays, which can disrupt inventory schedules and shelf-life requirements.
p3_solution: By pre-filing all declarations and using a relay driver system, we’ve maintained a consistent schedule and minimized time spent at the border.
p4_sub: Urgent import of heavy construction machinery, cleared and delivered within 72 hours of arrival.
p4_overview: A high-priority air freight shipment of precision equipment from Germany to Jordan to support an active construction project in Amman.
p4_challenge: The machinery was too large for standard pallets and needed immediate customs clearance to avoid costly downtime at the construction site.
p4_solution: We coordinated with a heavy-lift air carrier and prepared all customs documents before arrival to ensure the equipment was on-site within 3 days.
p5_sub: LCL consolidation for a local retailer, combining multiple suppliers into a single efficient shipment.
p5_overview: Managing the consolidation of retail products from various suppliers in China. We used LCL (Less-than-Container Load) to keep shipping costs low for the client.
p5_challenge: Coordinating multiple suppliers and ensuring all documentation was accurate for a single consolidated customs entry in Jordan.
p5_solution: We set up a central tracking system for all suppliers and provided a single-window customs solution to simplify the entire process for the client.
p6_sub: Specialized movement of oversized energy infrastructure across three countries.
p6_overview: A complex project involving the transport of oversized components for the energy sector from Jordan to the UAE, requiring specialized permits and escorts.
p6_challenge: The cargo's dimensions exceeded standard limits, meaning we had to coordinate temporary road closures and secure permits across three jurisdictions.
p6_solution: Our team conducted a full route survey, secured all necessary oversize permits, and managed the entire convoy with professional escort teams.
proj_cta_p: Tell us what you need to move and we’ll provide a reliable plan within 24 hours.
pd_cta_p: Have a similar project? Let’s discuss how we can help.
